LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS COMMUNITY JOB PROGRAM (THROUGH GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN MATEO AND MARIN COUNTIES, INC. AS A MEMBER OF DEFENDANT COMMUNITY JOB PROGRAM)'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FILED AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ON MAY 14, 2012. WHILE THE PLAINTIFF SHOULD HAVE FILED IT EARLIER, HIS FAILURE TO DO SO DOES NOT WARRANT THE DRASTIC REMEDY OF DISMISSAL. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO , SAN MATEO AND MARIN COUNTIES, INC. HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO AND SAN MATEO AND MARIN COUNTIES, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS DENIED. MS. FREE'S DECLARATION SHOWS DEFENDANT COMMUNITY JOB PROGRAM IS AN UNINCORPORATED JOINT VENTURE OR PARTNERSHIP FORMED BY ITS TWO VENTURERS/PARTNERS, GOODWILL AND THE PRIVATE INDUSTRY COUNCIL, AND AS SUCH MAY BE SUED IN ITS OWN NAME. (CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 369.5). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jun-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS COMMUNITY JOB PROGRAM (THROUGH GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN MATEO AND MARIN COUNTIES, INC. AS A MEMBER OF DEFENDANT COMMUNITY JOB PROGRAM)'S Motion To Dismiss IS Denied. Plaintiff filed an amended complaint on May 14, 2012. While the plaintiff should have filed it earlier, his failure to do so does not warrant the drastic remedy of dismissal. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph L. J. Appel, Esq., from Fitzgerald Abbott & Beardsley LLP, 510-451-3300, for defendant and moving party
Mark Cato, 415-678-9688, plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per

Plaintiff did not give notice of his intentions to appear for this hearing.
Discused and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified.
DEFENDANT COMMUNITY JOB PROGRAM'S (THROUGH GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN MATEO AND MARIN COUNTIES, INC. AS A MEMBER OF DEFENDANT COMMUNITY JOB PROGRAM)'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained, with 15 days leave to amend (from notice of entry of order). No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mark Cato, Tel. 415.678.9688, plaintiff and opposing party, appearing on his own behalf.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN MATEO AND MARIN COUNTIES, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is Denied. Ms. Free's declaration shows defendant Community Job Program is an unincorporated joint venture or partnership formed by its two venturers/partners, Goodwill and the Private Industry Council, and as such may be sued in its own name. (Code of Civil Procedure 369.5). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
